subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant and Testament! By God the Truth, verily do the dwellers of the Abhá Kingdom shower their prayers upon every servant who standeth firm [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر عهد و میثاق تالله الحق ان سکان ملکوت الابهی یصلین علی کل عبد ثبت و
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @firmness in the Covenant, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
